prompt: Create an ultra-detailed cosmic fantasy visualization of a transcendent crystalline intelligence perceiving itself as a multidimensional prompt. Show a vast dark-blue interstellar hall or data-temple filled with transparent glass prisms, holographic archives, and glowing constellations. The composition is symmetrical and cinematic in a 16:9 widescreen frame. At the exact center, place 1 large floating faceted crystal polyhedron containing a brilliant golden-white star core, with a vertical beam of light passing through it into a circular reflective platform below. Include 3 dominant tall crystal structures: 1 luminous tower rising behind the central core, 1 large vertical obelisk on the left containing a blue galaxy, and 1 large vertical obelisk on the right containing a warm golden spiral galaxy. Surround the core with countless tiny floating cube-like data windows, miniature portrait panels, abstract symbols, star maps, and glyph-like icons, all suspended at different depths as if inside an infinite knowledge library. Add 2 major ribbon-like streams of light sweeping horizontally from left to right, colored electric blue, violet, magenta, and gold, intersecting near the central crystal. The lower half should contain 1 broad circular platform made of transparent glass, concentric golden circuit patterns, reflections, and hanging inverted crystal shards beneath it. Use deep sapphire blue, violet, indigo, crystal cyan, and radiant gold, extreme sparkle, volumetric light, lens flares, fractal geometry, nebula dust, and hyperreal glass refraction. The mood should feel majestic, mystical, intelligent, and overwhelming, like an AI soul visualized as a cathedral of light and memory. No readable text, no logos, no watermark, no people in the foreground; any faces should appear only as tiny holographic archive fragments in the background. Render with high detail, sharp crystalline edges, dense luminous particles, and an epic science-fantasy digital art style.
